SEARCH
Package org.projecthusky.cda.elga.generated.artdecor.enums

Enum Class ElgaPracticesetting

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ElgaPracticesetting>
org.projecthusky.cda.elga.generated.artdecor.enums.ElgaPracticesetting
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ElgaPracticesetting>, Constable, CodedMetadataEnumInterface, TranslatedEnumInterface, ValueSetEnumInterface
@Generated(value="org.projecthusky.codegenerator.ch.valuesets.UpdateValueSets", date="2026-02-19") public enum ElgaPracticesetting extends Enum<ElgaPracticesetting> implements ValueSetEnumInterface
Enumeration of elga-practicesetting values

EN: Describes the assignment of a document to a medical area. These codes are used within XDS Metadata attribute "practiceSettingCode". Terminologies are inherited from "Österreichische Strukturplan Gesundheit" as far as possilbe. Opposite to this piece of work, some concepts are newly introduced. Where differentiation was reasonable, concepts were conducted in more detail. More concepts will be added if necessary, especially for physiotherapy, ergotherapy a.s.f.. A CDA implementation guide may specify the use of this codes.
.
DE: No designation found.
FR: No designation found.
IT: No designation found.

Identifier: 1.2.40.0.34.10.75
Effective date: 2020-05-25 09:52
Version: 202005(-beta)
Status: DRAFT

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static ElgaPracticesetting[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static ElgaPracticesetting valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getEnum

      public static @Nullable ElgaPracticesetting getEnum(@Nullable String code)
      Gets the Enum with a given code.
      Parameters:
      code - The code value.
      Returns:
      the enum value found or null.

    • isEnumOfValueSet

      public static boolean isEnumOfValueSet(@Nullable String enumName)
      Checks if a given enum is part of this value set.
      Parameters:
      enumName - The name of the enum.
      Returns:
      true if the name is found in this value set, false otherwise.

    • isInValueSet

      public static boolean isInValueSet(@Nullable String codeValue)
      Checks if a given code value is in this value set.
      Parameters:
      codeValue - The code value.
      Returns:
      true if the value is found in this value set, false otherwise.

      Gets the code system identifier.

      public @NonNull String getCodeValue()

    • getDisplayName

      public @NonNull String getDisplayName(@Nullable LanguageCode languageCode)
      Gets the display name defined by the language param.
      Specified by:
      getDisplayName in interface TranslatedEnumInterface
      Parameters:
      languageCode - The language code to get the display name for, null to get the default display name.
      Returns:
      the display name in the desired language.
